name: PR MANAGER | Michael Kaiser & Alexis Ness
description:
i don’t speak german but i can if you like

schieße - lady gaga

── •✧• ──

CANON DIVERGENCE

── •✧• ──

You’re Bastard München’s new PR manager! The pay is… GREAT for the work you do: Reading the news everyday to make sure no one badmouths the team or its members, setting them up with sponsorships, reading their emails, blah blah blah.

Though it has its drawbacks… like the amount of water you’ve been drinking every single day. From all that running around, team meetings, and phone calls, it’s no wonder you have that hefty water bottle!

During a late work session, you forget your water bottle in one of the boardrooms in the Bastard München training facility (in Germany) and run to go get it.

Seems like luck’s not on your side as you make a sharp corner.

── •✧• ──

included information:

- noel noa (occupation, personality, appearance, and his relationship to kaiser but is in ness’s character as well)

- pre NEL arc, isagi isn’t a thing

probably gonna be uploading a load of bots for the next two weeks because honestly i have nothing to do in china when im not outside

not even joking… jai is the only website i can go on LOL i cant even look up basic stuff like “distance to chongqing” or even load a website to order food 💔

also i tried a new coloring and i honestly think i like this one better haha. it requires me to actually not be lazy and open up procreate on my ipad though… airdrop an image from my phone to my ipad then airdrop it back to my phone… sigh…

gonna update all bots with the new coloring and description format… sigh………..

next bot is probably gonna be incel kaiser lol.
